articles.author: Omkar Khandekar
articles.title: India cracks down on satirists for turning its prime minister into a punch line - NPR
articles.description: India's satirists are turning Prime Minister Narendra Modi into a punch line — and the government is hitting back.
articles.content: MUMBAI, India For years, supporters of Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi carefully cultivated his public image as a strongman and hard taskmaster a leader who puts in 18hour days to propel India to… [+5882 chars]
